Elite Tech Branches

BranchKeyLevel 1 valueLevel 100 valueMeaning
Corrosive DamageAddCorrosiveDamage1100100% effect at level 100.
Energy Burn 10 SecondsAddEnergyBurn1100Adds 100% total DoT over 10 seconds at level 100.
Corrosive Burn 10 SecondsAddCorrosiveBurn1100Adds 100% total DoT over 10 seconds at level 100.
Extra ProjectilesAddExtraProjectiles1100Changes projectile count and redistributes damage per projectile.
Improved Direct DamageIncreaseDirectDamage0.757575% effect at level 100.

Reduce Target ArmorReduceTargetArmor0.11010% effect at level 100.

Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Reduce power consumption by 10%. Increase damage by 20%. Mine lvl 1Steel x400n/a
2Increase damage by 25%. Improved explosion radius.Mine lvl 1Steel x800n/a
3Increase refire rate by 25%. Reduce power consumption by 10%. Can place six additional mines.Mine lvl 1Steel x1600n/a
4Increase damage by 31%. Increase refire by 25%. Improved explosion radius.Mine lvl 1Steel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x800
5Increase damage by 32%. Mine lvl 1Steel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase damage by 62%. Adds proximity trigger to the mines. Mines activate after 1 sec. Can place six additional mines.Mine lvl 6Steel x12800Iridium x800
